title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 28 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 28 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 28 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends, the main contract closed 882.5. an decrease of 2.11% throughout the day;Part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak; Inquiries from steel mills have decreased, resulting in poor purchasing enthusiasm. PBF at Shandong port dealt 880-895 yuan/mt; prices are mixed today over yesterday.
